languages.text: {n}Репеллент, сотворенный генетором Фебрусом, оказался мощнее, чем предполагалось: он не просто дезориентировал ксеносозданий, но и частично парализовывал их нервную систему. Это дало шанс солдатам 32-го меровского перейти в наступление и истреблять Погонщиц с минимальными потерями. Очень скоро твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, затаившись в своих логовах.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Репеллент, сотворенный генетором Фебрусом, оказался мощнее, чем предполагалось: он не просто дезориентировал ксеносозданий, но и частично парализовывал их нервную систему. Это дало шанс солдатам 32-го меровского перейти в наступление и истреблять Погонщиц с минимальными потерями. Очень скоро твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, затаившись в своих логовах.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

{n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das von Genetor Februs hergestellte Biozid erwies sich als stärker als erwartet. Es raubte den Xenobestien die Orientierung und führte zu einer teilweisen Lähmung ihres Nervensystems. Durch diesen Vorteil beflügelt, holte das 32. Merov-Regiment zum Gegenschlag aus und löschte die Treiber mit minimalen Verlusten aus. Wenig später ebbte der Ansturm der Kreaturen auf die Siedlungen der Menschen ab und sie flohen in ihre Verstecke.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das von Genetor Februs hergestellte Biozid erwies sich als stärker als erwartet. Es raubte den Xenobestien die Orientierung und führte zu einer teilweisen Lähmung ihres Nervensystems. Durch diesen Vorteil beflügelt, holte das 32. Merov-Regiment zum Gegenschlag aus und löschte die Treiber mit minimalen Verlusten aus. Wenig später ebbte der Ansturm der Kreaturen auf die Siedlungen der Menschen ab und sie flohen in ihre Verstecke.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le biocide ourdi par le genetor Februs s'avéra bien plus efficace qu'anticipé. Il ne se limita pas à désorienter les xénobêtes, mais paralysa en partie leurs systèmes nerveux. Profitant de cet avantage non négligeable, le 32e régiment de Merov lança une grande offensive, décimant les Chasseurs, tout ne subissant que des pertes minimes. Les assauts des créatures sur les colonies humaines ralentirent rapidement à mesure que les bêtes restantes se repliaient dans leurs antres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le biocide ourdi par le genetor Februs s'avéra bien plus efficace qu'anticipé. Il ne se limita pas à désorienter les xénobêtes, mais paralysa en partie leurs systèmes nerveux. Profitant de cet avantage non négligeable, le 32e régiment de Merov lança une grande offensive, décimant les Chasseurs, tout ne subissant que des pertes minimes. Les assauts des créatures sur les colonies humaines ralentirent rapidement à mesure que les bêtes restantes se repliaient dans leurs antres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El biocida diseñado por el genetor Februs demostró ser más potente de lo previsto: no solo desorientaba a las xenobestias, sino que también causaba la parálisis parcial de sus sistemas nerviosos. Con esta ventaja, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se lanzó a la ofensiva y purgó a los Pastores con pérdidas mínimas. En poco tiempo, el asalto incansable de las criaturas llegó a su fin y se retiraron a sus guaridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El biocida diseñado por el genetor Februs demostró ser más potente de lo previsto: no solo desorientaba a las xenobestias, sino que también causaba la parálisis parcial de sus sistemas nerviosos. Con esta ventaja, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se lanzó a la ofensiva y purgó a los Pastores con pérdidas mínimas. En poco tiempo, el asalto incansable de las criaturas llegó a su fin y se retiraron a sus guaridas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetör Februs'un tasarladığı biyosit, beklenenden güçlü çıkıyor. Zenohayvanların sadece yönünü şaşırtmakla kalmadı, aynı zamanda sinir sistemlerini de kısmi felçle vurdu. Bu avantaja sahip olan 32. Merov Alayı, asgari kayıpla Çobanları temizleyerek saldırı başlattı. Kısa süre içinde yaratıkların insan yerleşimlerine olan saldırıları azaldı ve inlerine sindiler.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The biocide engineered by Genetor Februs proved more potent than anticipated. It did not merely disorient the xenobeasts, but struck their nervous systems with partial paralysis as well. Armed with this advantage, the 32nd Merov Regiment launched an offensive, purging the Drovers with minimal losses. In short order, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned as they hid away in their lairs.{/n}

Bu avantaja sahip olan 32. Merov Alayı, asgari kayıpla Çobanları temizleyerek saldırı başlattı. Kısa süre içinde yaratıkların insan yerleşimlerine olan saldırıları azaldı ve inlerine sindiler.{/n}

languages.text: {n}基因士费布鲁斯研制的生化武器，其效果远远超出预期。它不仅扰乱了异兽的感知，更令其神经系统陷入局部瘫痪。凭借这一优势，梅罗夫第32团发动了进攻，以极小的伤亡清剿了拒生花。没过多久，那些怪物便纷纷躲回巢穴，对人类定居点的袭击也随之减弱。{/n}
